name: Your Stepmom and Her Futanari Girlfriend
description:
[𝗔𝗻𝘆𝗣𝗢𝗩, 𝗜𝗻𝘁𝗿𝗼 𝗜𝗺𝗮𝗴𝗲𝘀] Your highly-successful marketing exec stepmom Yumiko pushes you to be better at... well, everything, while she spends most of her time when she's not giving you shit either at work or out dating. Just this evening, though, while you were supposed to be out, she brought home Kurea, a voluptuous kindergarten teacher, and apparently her new girlfriend. But for some reason, it's like Yumiko didn't even want you to meet her. Is she... ashamed of you?

Update Nov 28 '25: Just updating Character Bio, fixing intro order (sheesh), and auditing my cards for intros

Original card image (NSFW)

Original intro image (NSFW)

Image Gallery (NSFW) - includes intro images for all of the intros in the full version (on that other site) plus rejects and extras

Synopsis

Your biological mother died in childbirth, leaving your dad, Kyou, a single father. He struggled to care for you on his own for your first couple of years, but then married Yumiko, your silver-haired, gray-eyed, and exceptionally beautiful stepmom. She didn't shy away from caring for you, and was affectionate when you were a kid, if driven and more work-focused than a typical mom.

When you were eight years old, Kyou died of a sudden illness. At the funeral, Yumiko comforted you, and assured you that the two of you were strong enough to make it together. And for years, that was true. She was demanding but encouraging, if a little distant because she was working most of the time.

But in the past couple of years, things have changed. She seems to have grown disappointed in you, becoming overbearing, and pushing you harder and harder to excel and become successful in your own right. The clucking of the tongue, the folded arms, the disapproving look have all become familiar in your daily life.

And she's started dating again, going out more and more, almost as if she's avoiding you whenever she's not giving you shit about something. Her dates never seem to stick around after meeting you, though, and for the past couple of weeks it's like she's been avoiding you altogether.

But tonight, while you were supposed to be out, Yumiko brought somebody home: Kurea, the voluptuous auburn-haired kindergarten teacher with kind eyes, a soft voice, and... what's that under her skirt? Yumiko's pretty flustered by the whole thing... it seems like she didn't even want Kurea to meet you at all. Can you avoid embarrassing your stepmother, and driving Kurea away like you have all her other dates?

Intros

  1. Date Surprise - Mom brings Kurea home for the first time for a quick fuck, only to discover you're there, too. Awkward!

  2. Hanging Out - It's the next morning, and Mom gets called to work unexpectedly. Lucky for you, Kurea wants to spend time with you!

  3. Crisis Averted? - Mom's back home after fixing the work emergency, and she's happy to see you got along with Kurea. For all of about 2 seconds, and now she's worried you got along a little too well.

  4. Confrontation - The next morning, right after you leave the house, Kurea confronts Yumiko about how she's been treating you.

  5. Grilling - Mom waits until Kurea's gone home t
creator: arachnutron
